title: viola arguta subsp. typica
intro: Viola arguta subsp. typica, also known as the Chinese mountain viola, is a subspecies of flowering plant belonging to the genus Viola. It is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Viola arguta subsp. typica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
